---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for LecturAL
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

A clear, one-line description of the requested improvement.

## Problem

What are you trying to do that LecturAL does not support well today?

## Proposed solution

What should LecturAL do instead?

## User workflow

Describe the command, plugin action, or output change this would affect.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you considered.

## Scope notes

Out of scope today: parallel batch, non-developer GUI, GPU path, speaker diarization, and translation. Mention if your request touches these.
